name: FLOWER TOUCH — 7
subtitle: Gesha · Panama
longNotes:
Our rarest Gesha, poured in very limited cups.

Sourced in small quantities, served with intention.

A luminous Gesha from Paso Ancho: layered florals, ripe stone fruit, and a clean, winey grape note that reads almost like chilled muscat. Built for slow pours and quiet attention.
process: 2 days cold natural fermentation at 16°C, then 3 days washed fermentation at 16°C

name: WILDER LAZO — 7
subtitle: Gesha · Colombia
longNotes: Natural Gesha with a tea-like frame: bergamot and soft citrus lift over jammy blueberry and a long, shifting finish. For guests who like nuance without sharp acidity.

name: EL CHAFEROTE — 7
subtitle: Pink Bourbon · Colombia
longNotes: Washed Pink Bourbon from Huila: bright pink citrus, rounded orchard sweetness, and a soft floral lift that stays clean through the cup. Approachable but still plenty to talk about.
